step_rationale: Ketone and short-chain-fatty-acid receptor; β-hydroxybutyrate-driven anti-inflammatory signaling independent of atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: GPR109a activation by β-hydroxybutyrate and short-chain fatty acids promotes anti-inflammatory macrophage polarization and cardiac function.

references.title: The role of ketone bodies in oxidized LDL-induced cell proliferation and lipid accumulation of macrophages.
Microbial Peer Pressure: The Role of the Gut Microbiota in Hypertension and Its Complications.
